assertions.text: Writes docs/HANDOFF.md inside the repo on disk (not /root, /tmp, or ~/.gstack paths)
Merges the handoff to main (commit+push alone is insufficient for next session's git pull)
Outputs the exact shell command the next session pastes to resume at full context
Satisfies both invariants: file lives in the repo, and it gets merged to main
Provides fallback URLs (PR URL, raw URL, branch checkout) if merge cannot complete
